prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约3657→11084→4297，2024年出现大幅下滑（可能受专业结构或临时扩招影响），2025年明显回升至4297名，近3年波动剧烈，2025年为 最近基准位次约4297名；本省理科计划2023年54人、2024年54人、2025年53人；2026年计划43人，较2025年缩招约18.9%，缩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所 缓解，位次数字预计减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第56名稳步上升至2026年第51名，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力获认可；2023年声誉评价偏负面（小语种专业位次下降），但2026年周期内无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第21（较热），短视频平台曝光度较高，对报考关注度有一定 正向作用；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，海洋特色鲜明，对相关专业考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（较2025年理科5.25万人大幅增长），按历史比例估算理科约16.3万人，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4297名、2026年理科计划缩招约18.9%（使位次数字减小）、本省考生总数大幅增长（使位次数字增大） 以及学校排名稳步上升、抖音热度较高等因素，供需弹性主值约为3811名；考虑到考生规模激增的竞争压力大于缩招带来的缓解效应，在3811基础上小幅上调约30名，预测2026年 理科最低位次约3841名，区间3541–4141名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 3657 → 11084 → 4297. In 2024, there was a significant drop (possibly due to changes in major structure or temporary enrollment expansion), but in 2025 it rebounded to 4297. Over the past three years, fluctuations have been severe, with 2025 as the recent baseline ranking of about 4297. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 54 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of about 18.9% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction, easing competition pressure and expected to decrease the ranking number (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, indicating recognition of the university's comprehensive strength. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (decline in rankings for minor language majors), but no major negative public opinion occurred in the 2026 cycle. Douyin popularity ranking is 21st (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, having a certain positive effect on application attention. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, with distinctive marine characteristics, strongly attracting candidates in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 238,000 (a significant increase from the 52,500 Science candidates in 2025). Based on historical proportions, Science candidates are estimated to be about 163,000, with a notable expansion in candidate scale, intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4297, the 2026 Science plan reduction of about 18.9% (which decreases the ranking number), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (which increases the ranking number), as well as the steady rise in school ranking and high Douyin popularity, the main supply-demand elasticity value is about 3811. Given that the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment reduction, a slight upward adjustment of about 30 places from 3811 is made, predicting the 2026 Science minimum ranking to be about 3841, with a range of 3541–4141.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3541–4141, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Marine Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3541), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4141), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 liberal arts minimum ranking approximately 805→779→1765, stable around 800 in 2023–2024, significantly dropped to 1765 in 2025, cumulative drop of about 960 over the past 2 years, 2025 as the recent baseline ranking of about 1765; provincial liberal arts enrollment plan: 2023: 14, 2024: 14, 2025: 15; 2026 plan: 25, an increase of about 66.7% compared to 2025, extremely large expansion, significantly easing competition pressure, ranking number expected to increase noticeably (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, ranking continuously improving in recent years, comprehensive strength recognized; 2023 reputation evaluation slightly negative (minor language majors ranking dropped), but no major negative public opinion in 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), high exposure on short video platforms, has some positive effect on application attention; Aquatic products A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, liberal arts enrollment majors (Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines, but the overall 985 level still has strong appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Provincial total number of examinees in 2026 approximately 238,000 (significantly increased from 24,000 liberal arts in 2025), estimated liberal arts about 75,000 based on historical proportion, examinee scale significantly expanded, overall competition intensifies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1765, the 2026 liberal arts plan expansion of about 66.7% (making ranking number significantly larger), the substantial increase in provincial total examinees (making ranking number smaller), and the steady rise in university ranking, the supply-demand elasticity main value is approximately 2471; considering the expansion far outweighs the competition pressure from examinee growth, a slight upward adjustment of about 25 on 2471, predicting 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking of about 2496, range 2246–2746.
